cfg_statements.code: n = int(input())
as_ = list(int(i) for i in input().split())
history = []

if abs(max(as_)) > abs(min(as_)): # 正に寄せる # 正のMaxを負の要素に繰り返し分配 x = as_.index(max(as_)) while not all([a >= 0 for a in as_]): for y, a in enumerate(as_): if a < 0: as_, history = distribute(as_, history, x, y) # 前から順に走査し反転箇所で前の要素を後ろの要素に足し合わせる for x in range(len(as_) - 1): # 反転箇所で if as_[x + 1] - as_[x] < 0: as_, history = distribute(as_, history, x, x + 1) else: # 負に寄せる # 負のMaxを正の要素に繰り返し分配 x = as_.index(min(as_)) while not all([a <= 0 for a in as_]): for y, a in enumerate(as_): if a > 0: as_, history = distribute(as_, history, x, y) # 後ろから順に走査し反転箇所で後ろの要素を前の要素に足し合わせる for x in reversed(range(len(as_) - 1)): # 反転箇所で if as_[x + 1] - as_[x] < 0: as_, history = distribute(as_, history, x + 1, x)
x = as_.index(max(as_))
while not all([a >= 0 for a in as_]): for y, a in enumerate(as_): if a < 0: as_, history = distribute(as_, history, x, y)
for y, a in enumerate(as_): if a < 0: as_, history = distribute(as_, history, x, y)
if a < 0: as_, history = distribute(as_, history, x, y)
as_, history = distribute(as_, history, x, y)
for x in range(len(as_) - 1): # 反転箇所で if as_[x + 1] - as_[x] < 0: as_, history = distribute(as_, history, x, x + 1)
if as_[x + 1] - as_[x] < 0: as_, history = distribute(as_, history, x, x + 1)
as_, history = distribute(as_, history, x, x + 1)
x = as_.index(min(as_))
while not all([a <= 0 for a in as_]): for y, a in enumerate(as_): if a > 0: as_, history = distribute(as_, history, x, y)
for y, a in enumerate(as_): if a > 0: as_, history = distribute(as_, history, x, y)
if a > 0: as_, history = distribute(as_, history, x, y)
as_, history = distribute(as_, history, x, y)
for x in reversed(range(len(as_) - 1)): # 反転箇所で if as_[x + 1] - as_[x] < 0: as_, history = distribute(as_, history, x + 1, x)
if as_[x + 1] - as_[x] < 0: as_, history = distribute(as_, history, x + 1, x)
as_, history = distribute(as_, history, x + 1, x)
output_history(history)
print(len(history))
for h in history: print('{0} {1}'.format(h[0], h[1]))
list_[y] += list_[x]
hstr.append((x + 1, y + 1))
return list_, hstr
